summary: A vertical clip from a congressional hearing, posted by the USCIS Director. He sits at a witness table in a dark suit and tie with glasses, speaking into a microphone; a printed witness placard in front of him reads 'Joseph Edlow / Director / U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services', with water bottles on the table and seated attendees behind him. Burned-in white captions with a red highlight box track his spoken remarks about screening and vetting and not cutting corners. The audio is hearing-room speech.

script.scene: A man in a dark suit and glasses speaks at a hearing witness table; placard reads 'Joseph Edlow / Director / U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services'. Caption with red highlight: 'to make SURE that'.
Same framing as he continues testifying, hands on the table near the microphone.

notable_text: Joseph Edlow; Director; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; to make sure that
